prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **F6A 660cc turbocharged Kei-car engine** (from Suzuki Alto Works RS/R) with a **Garrett GT15 turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 264° camshafts**, and **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** for optimized spool and flow. Retain the SJ413's **5-speed manual transmission** but reinforce it with a **PPG close-ratio gearset (2.355, 1.505, 1.125, 0.865, 0.725)** and a **Competition Clutch Stage 3 puck-style clutch** for durability under boost.

Full **custom wire-tube chassis reinforcement** using **4130 chromoly tubing** (TIG-welded by **Kogure Racing**) to eliminate flex, paired with **Polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension** and a **custom 3-link rear suspension setup** with **Ohlins DFV coilovers (400lb/in front, 350lb/in rear)** for adjustable damping and ride height. Front sway bar upgraded to a **Whiteline 22mm adjustable unit** to reduce body roll.

Fuel system overhaul with a **Walbro 255lph in-tank fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** for precise tuning. Ignition system upgraded to **NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (BKR6EIX)** and a **MSD 6AL ignition box** for consistent spark under high RPM. Cooling system includes a **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** and **SPAL 12" puller fan** to prevent heat soak in off-road conditions.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified for SJ413 chassis) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** and **duckbill rear spoiler** for aggressive stance. Front bumper replaced with a **custom steel tube bumper** (fabricated by **ARB**) with **PIAA 520 HID lights** integrated into the design.

**Custom roll cage** (8-point, TIG-welded by **Custom Cages UK**) with **bolt-in door bars** and **harness bar**, finished in **Gloss Black powder coat**. Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro SRD seats (90s JDM spec)** and **Takata 4-point harnesses**, paired with a **Nardi Classic steering wheel** and **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, water temp)** mounted on a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**.

**Forged aluminum Method MR502VT wheels (15x8 +15 offset)** wrapped in **BFGoodrich KM3 tires (215/75R15)** for off-road grip. Fender vents added for brake cooling, with **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers** clamping **12.1" rotors** up front and **2-piston calipers** on **11.5" rotors** in the rear. Exhaust exits through a **custom 2.5" stainless steel side-exit system** with a **Burns Stainless muffler** for a deep, aggressive tone.
